violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of black residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice disposed and unit taken out of serviced to be washed and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/12/2024

(Dairy products) was observed held at (48-49 ) degrees Fahrenheit in carafe on counter. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling.. Per person in charge, items had been on the counter for about 2 hours. Items were relocated to a refrigeration unit to cool. Food must not be stored out of refrigeration. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/12/2024
